purpose: Canonical judge-first copy for track workspaces, reviewer packets, and the first 30 to 45 seconds of track videos.

tracks.title: Core Reviewer Packet
whatWorksNow: Lead the first 90 seconds from /start into /govern with a real wallet-first path.
Use /proof/?judge=1, trust package, diagnostics, and services as the second-stage proof of maturity.
Keep the README, deck, story video, and product learning path perfectly aligned with the live site.

externallyProven.label: Proof center
externallyProven.summary: The full governance lifecycle, proof packets, and reviewer path are already visible inside the live product.

externallyProven.label: Launch trust packet
externallyProven.summary: The repo already binds launch truth, blockers, and buyer-safe trust wording into one explicit packet.

externallyProven.label: Treasury reviewer packet
externallyProven.summary: Generated treasury packet that makes sender discipline, reference-linked rails, payments fit, and the exact treasury blocker reviewer-visible.

externallyProven.label: Reviewer telemetry packet
externallyProven.summary: Generated telemetry truth packet that binds runtime evidence, integration evidence, read-node snapshot, and testnet service metrics into one reviewer-safe route.

tracks.exactBlockerSummary: The startup-quality path remains blocked until production multisig, authority transfer signatures, and post-transfer readouts are recorded.
tracks.bestDemoSummary: Lead with /start, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the product story across routes. Close the route by opening /documents/treasury-reviewer-packet and /documents/reviewer-telemetry-packet so payments readiness and the data corridor stay inside the same proof story.

tracks.title: Runtime Infrastructure Reviewer Packet

Use the service catalog, SLA, pricing, and trust package as the commercial proof layer.
Keep the Fast RPC role explicit in video, deck, README, and services UI.
